sourcing.title: Premium Vehicle Sources
sourcing.description: We rigorously select vehicles from trusted channels across China's automotive market. Every vehicle undergoes multi-point inspection before entering our inventory.

guarantee.title: Vehicle Condition Guarantee
guarantee.description: Professional inspection reports with full transparency on vehicle condition. Backed by our 90-day buyback guarantee for your peace of mind.

process.title: Flexible Purchase Process
process.description: Secure your vehicle with just a deposit. Pay the remaining balance when your vehicle is ready for export customs clearance.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in Chinese Used Car Export
about.intro: Shandong Jiefang is a professional used car export company based in Shandong Province, China. We specialize in sourcing, inspecting, and exporting high-quality used vehicles to international auto dealers worldwide.
